case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. SUPER SERVICE CARRIERS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUPER SERVICE CARRIERS LLC AKA SUPPER SERVICE CARRIERS LLC $10,553.40 PRINCIPAL, $1,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,294.80 INTEREST, $417.89 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,666.09, SEE SCANNED DOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100217469), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED SEP-26-2023, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SUPER SERVICE CARRIERS LLC AKA SUPPER SERVICE CARRIERS LLC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 100212734) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100212734) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SUPER SERVICE CARRIERS LLC AKA SUPPER SERVICE CARRIERS LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2024
